subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. His is the creation and the command. He giveth life and causeth death, then causeth death and giveth life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر یحیی و یمیت ثم یمیت و یحیی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
